description_long: This is a compact, white plastic lotion bottle with a cylindrical body and a rounded, screw-on cap. The bottle features a prominent yellow-green label with printed text, partially visible, and a block of smaller text on the side. Attached to the neck of the bottle is a metallic carabiner, allowing it to be clipped onto bags or belts for easy carrying. The overall design is utilitarian, with smooth surfaces and a practical, portable form factor. The cap appears to be a standard screw-on type, ensuring secure closure and leak prevention. The bottle is likely intended for personal use in outdoor or urban environments, such as parks or while commuting.
description: A small, white plastic lotion bottle with a yellow-green label and a metal carabiner for portability. It has a screw-on cap and a smooth, practical design.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the bottom, highlighting the round cap and the attached metal carabiner at the top.
description_view_1: A side profile shows the full length of the bottle, the yellow-green label, and the carabiner attachment.
description_view_2: The bottle is viewed from the top-back angle, emphasizing the carabiner and the upper part of the label.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile displays the label text more clearly and the cap at the right end.
